raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has pioneered cannabis reform for years, including the legalization of adult-use in 2016.",
    "AB 1793, passed in 2018, mandated the automatic sealing of cannabis records and was the first legislation of its kind in the nation.",
    "Several states have adopted automatic record relief inspired by California's AB 1793.",
    "There is wide variance in county compliance with the implementation of AB 1793 in California.",
    "Tens of thousands of Californians eligible for relief under AB 1793 continue to carry the weight of cannabis records due to incomplete implementation.",
    "AB 1706 mandates deadlines and guidance to complete the implementation of AB 1793 in California.",
    "California has a moral and economic imperative to address the cannabis criminal records of its residents."
  ]
}
```
